category_sources: source_facts.description says it sends events from shell scripts and similar environments; official GitHub README describes an OpenTelemetry command-line tool for sending traces from shell scripts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is otel-cli; official GitHub README heading is otel-cli.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README includes getting started, examples, local development, and command usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/equinix-labs/otel-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify an OpenTelemetry CLI for traces/events from shell scripts and OTLP workflows.
